Ploy CLI v2 — control plane and node management

Usage:
  ploy [flags]
  ploy [command]

Available Commands:
  cluster     Manage nodes and API tokens
  completion  Generate the autocompletion script for the specified shell
  config      Inspect or update control-plane configuration
  help        Help about any command
  job         Inspect jobs and follow logs
  mig         Plan and run Migs workflows
  run         Submit and inspect runs
  spec        Inspect and validate mig specs
  tui         Interactive TUI for migrations, runs, and jobs
  version     Print version information
  wave        Inspect and control launch waves

Flags:
  -h, --help      help for ploy
  -v, --version   Print version information

Use "ploy [command] --help" for more information about a command.
